ddls:
CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the measurement location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the measurement location */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that recorded the data */,
  "CH4_mean" REAL /* Mean concentration of Methane (CH4) in ppb */,
  "NMHC_mean" REAL /* Mean concentration of Non-Methane Hydrocarbons (NMHC) in ppb */,
  "NO2_mean" REAL /* Mean concentration of Nitrogen Dioxide (NO2) in ppb */,
  "NOX_mean" REAL /* Mean concentration of Nitrogen Oxides (NOX) in ppb */,
  "NO_mean" REAL /* Mean concentration of Nitric Oxide (NO) in ppb */,
  "PM25_mean" REAL /* Mean concentration of Particulate Matter (PM25) in µg/m³ */,
  "SO2_mean" REAL /* Mean concentration of Sulfur Dioxide (SO2) in ppb */,
  "SPM_mean" REAL /* Mean concentration of Suspended Particulate Matter (SPM) in µg/m³ */,
  "THC_mean" REAL /* Mean concentration of Total Hydrocarbons (THC) in ppb */,
  "data_reliability" INTEGER /* Reliability of the data (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant (e.g., CH4, NO2) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the pollutant (e.g., ppb, µg/m³) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the pollutant */,
  "health_impact" TEXT /* Health impact of the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of the site (e.g., urban, rural, industrial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring site where the measurement was recorded */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the air quality data record */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant being measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Actual measurement value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality data record accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the alert */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant triggering the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that was exceeded */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring site */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant */,
  "value" REAL /* Actual reading value */,
  "reliability" INTEGER /* Reliability of the reading (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_pollutants" (
  "site_pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site-pollutant link */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring site */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_pollutant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_pollutants_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_pollutants_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)
